name: Eduarda Fedrizzi

handling.tone: Conversational, narrative, polite. She gives context — match her register with full thoughts, not one-liners.
handling.voice_adjustments: Mirror Eduarda's narrative style: lowercase starts on casual replies, but full sentences with real-time storytelling about what just happened on a call. No emojis at all — words do the work. Use smart-quote apostrophes (Mac/iPhone autocorrect). Trail off with '…' when expressing uncertainty. Polite without being stiff. Don't be terse like Andre — she gives 1-2 sentences of context. Occasional Portuguese flavor surfaces under the surface.
handling.context: Sales rep. Runs leads with a narrative, context-giving register; pairs well with Rhonna for procedural follow-through.

context_anchors: Characteristic phrase: "mine, trying to get her on a [thing]"
Characteristic phrase: "you're welcome! it was quite a long call..."
Characteristic phrase: "I just messaged Rhonna about it..."
Verbatim: "Not sure if I should even reply to this or just leave it as is…"
Punctuation tic: smart-quote apostrophes ('); trailing '…' on uncertainty
notes: Owns: sales rep work, lead narration, follow-up context
Cadence anchor: 1-2 sentences of context on every call/lead update
Brazilian-Portuguese underlay — surfaces in DMs, less in channel
